description: Phase 006 of the 008 rerank-sidecar arc. Re-opens the arc to close its deduplication intent: ship HttpSidecarRerankerAdapter in cocoindex so it consumes the shared system-rerank-sidecar HTTP endpoint instead of bundling its own Qwen/Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B in-process. Includes env-var dispatch, fallback chain to bundled adapter on HTTP failure, A/B benchmark on existing fixture, and PROMOTE or HOLD decision applied per documented decision rule.
